chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.439 of 2022 Aamir Baqi Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply as at “A” 2. For orders on CMA 4430/22 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA 4431/22 Dated: 24.11.2023 Malik Waseem Iqbal for appellant. -.-.- An order impugned in these proceedings is simpliciter withdrawal. A suit was filed by KDA against defendants and one of them i.e. defendant No.7 being allegedly aggrieved of withdrawal of suit has filed this appeal contending therein that he was operating a petrol pump at the site in question. The appellant could not be deemed to have been deprived of any of his right (if exist), on account of such withdrawal of suit hence we do not find appellant to be an aggrieved entity in relation to any of his right (if any) which could have been snatched by virtue of this withdrawal. Appeal is misconceived and is accordingly dismissed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
